title: Canton of Melle

infobox.key: [Authority control databases](/wiki/Help:Authority_control "Help:Authority control") [Edit this at Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q1726204#identifiers "Edit this at Wikidata")

infobox.value: This [Deux-Sèvres](/wiki/Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Deux-Sèvres") geographical article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Canton_of_Melle&action=edit).

is an administrative division of the [Deux-Sèvres](/wiki/Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Deux-Sèvres") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France"), western [France](/wiki/France "France"). Its borders were modified at the French canton reorganisation which came into effect in March 2015. Its seat is in [Melle](/wiki/Melle,_Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Melle, Deux-Sèvres").[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

outgoing_links.target_title: Canton of Le Val de Thouet

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [46°13′N 0°09′W﻿ / ﻿46.22°N 0.15°W﻿ / 46.22; -0.15](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Canton_of_Melle&params=46.22_N_0.15_W_)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

French canton founded in 2015

The **[canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_France "Cantons of France") of Melle** is an administrative division of the [Deux-Sèvres](/wiki/Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Deux-Sèvres") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France"), western [France](/wiki/France "France"). Its borders were modified at the French canton reorganisation which came into effect in March 2015. Its seat is in [Melle](/wiki/Melle,_Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Melle, Deux-Sèvres").[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

It consists of the following communes:[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

1. [Alloinay](/wiki/Alloinay "Alloinay")
2. [Aubigné](/wiki/Aubign%C3%A9,_Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Aubigné, Deux-Sèvres")
3. [La Chapelle-Pouilloux](/wiki/La_Chapelle-Pouilloux "La Chapelle-Pouilloux")
4. [Chef-Boutonne](/wiki/Chef-Boutonne "Chef-Boutonne")
5. [Clussais-la-Pommeraie](/wiki/Clussais-la-Pommeraie "Clussais-la-Pommeraie")
6. [Couture-d'Argenson](/wiki/Couture-d%27Argenson "Couture-d'Argenson")
7. [Fontenille-Saint-Martin-d'Entraigues](/wiki/Fontenille-Saint-Martin-d%27Entraigues "Fontenille-Saint-Martin-d'Entraigues")
8. [Fontivillié](/wiki/Fontivilli%C3%A9 "Fontivillié")
9. [Limalonges](/wiki/Limalonges "Limalonges")
10. [Lorigné](/wiki/Lorign%C3%A9 "Lorigné")
11. [Loubigné](/wiki/Loubign%C3%A9 "Loubigné")
12. [Loubillé](/wiki/Loubill%C3%A9 "Loubillé")
13. [Mairé-Levescault](/wiki/Mair%C3%A9-Levescault "Mairé-Levescault")
14. [Maisonnay](/wiki/Maisonnay "Maisonnay")
15. [Marcillé](/wiki/Marcill%C3%A9 "Marcillé")
16. [Melle](/wiki/Melle,_Deux-S%C3%A8vres "Melle, Deux-Sèvres")
17. [Melleran](/wiki/Melleran "Melleran")
18. [Saint-Romans-lès-Melle](/wiki/Saint-Romans-l%C3%A8s-Melle "Saint-Romans-lès-Melle")
19. [Saint-Vincent-la-Châtre](/wiki/Saint-Vincent-la-Ch%C3%A2tre "Saint-Vincent-la-Châtre")
20. [Sauzé-entre-Bois](/wiki/Sauz%C3%A9-entre-Bois "Sauzé-entre-Bois")
21. [Valdelaume](/wiki/Valdelaume "Valdelaume")
22. [Villemain](/wiki/Villemain "Villemain")
